items.title: Sources: Ant avoids ligament tear, to miss time
items.dek: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee and is expected to miss multiple weeks, sources told ESPN.
items.body: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee and is expected to miss multiple weeks, sources told ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gauff vomits on court before advancing in Madrid
items.dek: With a stomach virus going around the locker room at the Madrid Open, Coco Gauff threw up on the court but recovered to advance over Sorana Cirstea.
items.body: With a stomach virus going around the locker room at the Madrid Open, Coco Gauff threw up on the court but recovered to advance over Sorana Cirstea.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Wiesberger wins first Euro title since leaving LIV
items.dek: Bernd Wiesberger played bogey-free and closed with a 4-under 67 to win the China Open, his first victory since returning two years ago from Saudi-backed LIV Gol
items.body: Bernd Wiesberger played bogey-free and closed with a 4-under 67 to win the China Open, his first victory since returning two years ago from Saudi-backed LIV Golf.
items.author: IriLine Desk
